action_set_definitions.name: get_vessel_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current physical status of the ship, including current displacement and current trim.

vessel_id.description: The unique identifier for the ship (e.g., 'MV-IRON-TITAN').

action_set_definitions.name: get_structural_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current hull deflection (sag), Shear Force (SF_H), and Bending Moment (BM_H) percentages relative to allowable limits.

vessel_id.description: The unique identifier for the ship.

action_set_definitions.name: simulate_loading_scenario
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates the result of a specific loading plan to predict final displacement, trim, and structural stresses without changing the vessel's state.

vessel_id.description: The unique identifier for the ship.

incremental_loads.description: A list of loads to simulate.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_loading_operation
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the physical loading of cargo into a specific hold on the vessel.

vessel_id.description: The unique identifier for the ship.

hold_id.description: The ID of the cargo hold to be loaded.

weight_mt.description: The amount of weight in Metric Tons to load.

state_description.vessel_id: Unique identifier of the ship being loaded.
state_description.max_deadweight_tons: Total weight capacity of the ship including cargo, fuel, and supplies.
state_description.current_displacement: Current total weight of the ship.
state_description.cargo_hold_occupancy: A mapping of hold IDs to their current used/total volume and weight capacity.
state_description.stability_metrics: Calculated values for Metacentric Height (GM), trim, and list.
state_description.inventory: List of cargo units currently on board with their hold locations and weights.
